summary: Comprehensive testing of Demo Booking & Tracking workflow - Iteration 5. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working including Book Demo form, Demo Live Sheet (teacher/counsellor views), History page, Demo Feedback page, and navigation buttons on all dashboards.

issues: Minor React warning: <span> inside <option> element - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

backend: POST /api/demo/request - public endpoint, creates demo request with all fields
POST /api/demo/request - validates required fields (phone, email)
POST /api/demo/request - enforces max 3 demos per email limit
GET /api/demo/live-sheet - teacher access (sees demos, no teacher list)
GET /api/demo/live-sheet - counsellor access (sees demos + teacher list)
GET /api/demo/live-sheet - admin access (sees demos + teacher list)
GET /api/demo/live-sheet - student denied (403)
POST /api/demo/accept/{demo_id} - teacher accepts demo, creates class, creates student if needed
POST /api/demo/accept/{demo_id} - returns student credentials for new students
POST /api/demo/accept/{demo_id} - non-existent demo returns 404
POST /api/demo/accept/{demo_id} - student cannot accept (403)
POST /api/demo/assign - counsellor assigns demo to teacher
POST /api/demo/assign - admin can assign demos
POST /api/demo/assign - teacher cannot assign (403)
GET /api/demo/my-demos - student gets their demos
POST /api/demo/feedback - requires student role (403 for others)
POST /api/admin/grant-demo-extra - admin grants extra demo
POST /api/admin/grant-demo-extra - non-admin denied (403)
GET /api/history/search - admin/counsellor can search history logs
GET /api/history/users - returns students and teachers lists
GET /api/history/student/{id} - returns complete student profile with demos, classes, logs
GET /api/history/teacher/{id} - returns complete teacher profile with demos, classes, logs
GET /api/history/* - student denied (403)
GET /api/demo/all - admin/counsellor can view all demos
GET /api/demo/all - teacher denied (403)
GET /api/demo/feedback-pending - counsellor can view pending feedback
GET /api/demo/feedback-pending - student denied (403)
frontend: /book-demo form has all required fields (name, email, phone, date, time)
/book-demo form submission works - shows success screen
/login page has 'Book a Free Demo Class' CTA button
Teacher Dashboard has 'Demo Live Sheet' button
Counsellor Dashboard has 'Demo Live Sheet' and 'History & Search' buttons
Admin Dashboard has 'Demo Live Sheet' and 'History' buttons
Student Dashboard has 'Book a Demo' and 'Demo Feedback' buttons
/demo-live-sheet (teacher view) shows Accept Demo buttons, no assign dropdown
/demo-live-sheet (counsellor view) shows assign teacher dropdown and Assign to Teacher buttons
/history page loads with search, students list, teachers list
Teacher accept demo flow works - creates class, shows student credentials toast

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DemoLiveSheet.js line 193 - <span> inside <option> causes React hydration warning. Consider using plain text instead of span wrapper for teacher name display.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test demo requests created during backend testing (prefixed with test_, limit_test_, extra_test_, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo Booking workflow fully tested and working. All 4 role dashboards have correct navigation buttons. Public /book-demo page works without auth. Teacher can accept demos (auto-creates class + student). Counsellor can assign demos to teachers. History page shows comprehensive student/teacher profiles. Demo limit (max 3) enforced, admin can grant extra. Minor React warning in DemoLiveSheet about span inside option - cosmetic only.

features_verified.public_book_demo_form: WORKING - /book-demo accessible without login, form submission creates demo request
features_verified.demo_live_sheet_teacher: WORKING - Teacher sees pending demos with Accept button
features_verified.demo_live_sheet_counsellor: WORKING - Counsellor sees pending demos with assign dropdown
features_verified.teacher_accept_demo: WORKING - Creates class, creates student if needed, shows credentials
features_verified.counsellor_assign_demo: WORKING - Assigns demo to selected teacher
features_verified.demo_limit_enforcement: WORKING - Max 3 demos per email enforced
features_verified.admin_grant_extra_demo: WORKING - Admin can grant 1 extra demo
features_verified.history_search: WORKING - Search logs by name, email, action
features_verified.history_student_profile: WORKING - Complete student history with demos, classes, logs
features_verified.history_teacher_profile: WORKING - Complete teacher history with demos, classes, logs
features_verified.demo_feedback_page: WORKING - Student can view pending feedback (empty state shown)
features_verified.navigation_buttons: WORKING - All 4 dashboards + login page have correct demo-related buttons
